title: vaccinium furfuraceum
intro: Vaccinium furfuraceum, also known as the woolly blueberry, is a species of shrub in the heath family that is native to the mountainous regions of northeastern India and parts of Nepal. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium furfuraceum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Vaccinium furfuraceum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
